channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Iran Live Updates: Trump Says Strikes to Continue for Four to Five Weeks - WSJ
item.description:
1. Iran Live Updates: Trump Says Strikes to Continue for Four to Five Weeks  WSJ

  3. Trump Says He Would Deploy Ground Troops to Iran "If Necessary"  Time Magazine
  4. Live updates: Trump says Iran operations likely to last 4 to 5 weeks, but he's prepared ‘to go far longer’  AP News
  5. Trump defends Iran strikes, offers objectives for military operation  NPR

item.title: We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said. - The Washington Post
item.description:

  4. Trump: ‘I don’t care about polling’ showing Iran strikes unpopular  The Hill

item.title: Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks - CBS News

item.title: Trump’s Iran War Widens, Forcing Reluctant Allies to Choose - Bloomberg
item.description:
